amendments.reason: The v1.4 golden cohort is retired from release measurement after detector development; the v1.4 untouched cohort remains unexecuted and is conservatively withdrawn. The v1.5 exact historical exclusion ledger is committed before fresh metadata-only selection. No v1.5 source, labels, detector code, or detector output were consulted.

The public discovery contract locks a detector-independent collector, file eligibility rules, recipe patterns, deterministic IDs, explicit zero-hit rows, and output hashes before any v1.5 cohort source access.
Fresh disjoint v1.5 cohorts will be selected from two context-isolated GitHub metadata-only proposals after excluding the exact reset ledger. Release thresholds and detector rules do not change.
